title: Redesign Activity Timeline with Pills and Structured Layout

requirements.summary: Add 'Activity Timeline' sub-header at the top of the timeline section
acceptanceCriteria: Sub-header 'Activity Timeline' is visible at the top of the activity timeline

file_operations.description: Add 'Activity Timeline' as a sub-header at the top of the timeline component using appropriate typography (e.g., text-lg font-semibold). Position it above the existing comment list rendering logic.

requirements.summary: Display date and timestamp below the sub-header for each activity entry
acceptanceCriteria: Each activity entry shows date and timestamp
Date and timestamp are positioned directly below the sub-header
Timestamp format is consistent across all entries

file_operations.description: Update the comment rendering logic to display formatted date and timestamp at the top of each activity entry. Use consistent date formatting (e.g., 'MMM DD, YYYY HH:mm') and position it prominently below the 'Activity Timeline' header for each entry.

requirements.summary: Display action pill and outcome pill horizontally below date/timestamp
acceptanceCriteria: Action pill and outcome pill are displayed side by side horizontally
Pills use appropriate styling to distinguish them as pills (rounded, colored backgrounds)
Pills display relevant action and outcome text

file_operations.description: Add horizontal pill layout below the date/timestamp for each comment entry. Create two pill components displaying comment.action and comment.outcome with rounded styling (e.g., rounded-full or rounded-lg), colored backgrounds (differentiate action vs outcome with distinct colors), and appropriate padding. Arrange them horizontally using flexbox.

requirements.summary: Display comment text below the horizontally arranged pills
acceptanceCriteria: Comment text is displayed below the action and outcome pills
Comment text is readable and properly formatted
Layout maintains vertical flow: sub-header → date/timestamp → pills → comment

file_operations.description: Reposition the comment message text to appear below the action and outcome pills. Ensure the vertical layout flows: 'Activity Timeline' header → date/timestamp → horizontal pills (action + outcome) → comment message. Maintain readability with appropriate spacing and text styling.

requirements.summary: Update Comment type to include action and outcome fields and ensure data flows from backend to frontend
acceptanceCriteria: Backend Comment type includes action and outcome fields
Frontend can fetch and display action and outcome data for each comment
Data flows correctly from backend to frontend timeline display

file_operations.description: Verify that useGetCaseComments query correctly maps the Comment type from backend.d.ts (which already includes action and outcome fields) to the frontend. Ensure the query returns comments with action and outcome properties available for display in ActivityTimeline component.
